question_templates.count: How many tweets are labeled '{label}'? Answer with the number only.
question_templates.proportion: What percentage of tweets are labeled '{label}'? Round to the nearest integer, answer with the number only.
question_templates.entity_count: How many tweets about '{entity}' are labeled '{label}'? Answer with the number only.
question_templates.entity_argmax: Which airline received the most '{label}' tweets? Answer with the airline name only.
question_templates.shift: Did the share of '{label}' tweets rise or fall in the second half compared to the first? Answer 'rose' or 'fell'.
question_templates.top_k: Which {k} airlines received the most '{label}' tweets? List them from most to fewest, separated by ' > '.
question_templates.pairwise: Which airline has more '{label}' tweets: '{entity_a}' or '{entity_b}'? Answer with the airline name only.
